requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 and 220 V / 50 Hz Grid Compatibility
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——BDS/IEC 60335-2-40及220 V / 50 Hz电网兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——BDS/IEC 60335-2-40及220 V / 50 Hz電網相容性

summary.en: Bangladesh adopts BDS standards based on IEC frameworks for electrical safety of household and similar appliances. Heat pumps and air-conditioning equipment must comply with BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 (particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers) as part of the BSTI mandatory certification process. Bangladesh's grid operates at 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz — identical to China's grid parameters — meaning Chinese heat pump products are electrically compatible without voltage or frequency conversion. Product labelling must reflect Bangladesh voltage and frequency specifications. BTRC type-approval is additionally required for products incorporating wireless communication modules (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee) used for remote control or smart-home connectivity.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国依据IEC框架制定BDS标准，用于家用和类似用途电器的电气安全管理。热泵和空调设备须作为BSTI强制认证流程的一部分，符合BDS/IEC 60335-2-40（电热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）。孟加拉国电网为220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），频率50 Hz，与中国电网参数完全相同，意味着中国热泵产品无需电压或频率转换即可实现电气兼容。产品标签须反映孟加拉国电压和频率规格。此外，配备无线通信模块（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee）用于远程控制或智能家居连接的产品须另行取得BTRC型式认可。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國依據IEC框架制定BDS標準，用於家用和類似用途電器的電氣安全管理。熱泵和空調設備須作為BSTI強制認證流程的一部分，符合BDS/IEC 60335-2-40（電熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）。孟加拉國電網為220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），頻率50 Hz，與中國電網參數完全相同，意味著中國熱泵產品無需電壓或頻率轉換即可實現電氣相容。產品標籤須反映孟加拉國電壓和頻率規格。此外，配備無線通訊模組（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee）用於遠端控制或智慧家居連接的產品須另行取得BTRC型式認可。

standards_or_laws: BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 (heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers — particular requirements)
BDS/IEC 60335-1 (household and similar electrical appliances — general requirements)
BSTI mandatory certification framework for electrical goods
BTRC type-approval for wireless communication modules (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee)
Bangladesh grid: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China applies GB 4706.32 (safety of heat pumps and air conditioners, equivalent to IEC 60335-2-40) and GB 4706.1 (general safety, equivalent to IEC 60335-1) under the CCC mandatory regime. China's grid is 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz, identical to Bangladesh, confirming direct electrical compatibility. Chinese CCC safety test reports may provide useful technical evidence but are not directly accepted by BSTI as Bangladesh BDS/IEC compliance evidence. Wireless modules in Chinese products are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval in China, which is separate from Bangladesh BTRC type-approval.
summary.zh: 中国在CCC强制认证制度下执行GB 4706.32（热泵和空调安全，等效IEC 60335-2-40）和GB 4706.1（通用安全，等效IEC 60335-1）。中国电网为220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），频率50 Hz，与孟加拉国完全相同，确认了直接电气兼容性。中国CCC安全测试报告可作为有用的技术证据，但BSTI不直接接受其作为孟加拉国BDS/IEC合规证据。中国产品中的无线模块在中国须经SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，与孟加拉国BTRC型式认可体系不同。
summary.zht: 中國在CCC強制認證制度下執行GB 4706.32（熱泵和空調安全，等效IEC 60335-2-40）和GB 4706.1（通用安全，等效IEC 60335-1）。中國電網為220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），頻率50 Hz，與孟加拉國完全相同，確認了直接電氣相容性。中國CCC安全測試報告可作為有用的技術證據，但BSTI不直接接受其作為孟加拉國BDS/IEC合規證據。中國產品中的無線模組在中國須經SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，與孟加拉國BTRC型式認可體系不同。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval for wireless modules (China)

gap.en: Grid voltage and frequency are fully compatible — no hardware modification required for standard Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz heat pump products. The primary safety gap is certification: CCC test reports based on GB 4706.32 (which aligns closely with IEC 60335-2-40) may reduce re-testing scope but do not substitute BSTI mandatory certification to BDS/IEC 60335-2-40. Products with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other wireless modules require separate BTRC type-approval in Bangladesh, which is not substituted by Chinese SRRC approval. Exporters should confirm current BDS standard edition, BSTI test laboratory acceptance, and BTRC wireless module obligations before shipment.
gap.zh: 电网电压和频率完全兼容——标准中国220 V / 50 Hz热泵产品无需硬件改造。主要安全差距在于认证：基于GB 4706.32（与IEC 60335-2-40高度一致）的CCC检测报告可缩减重复测试范围，但不能替代BDS/IEC 60335-2-40的BSTI强制认证。配备Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他无线模块的产品须在孟加拉国另行取得BTRC型式认可，中国SRRC认可不予替代。出口商在出货前应确认当前BDS标准版本、BSTI检测实验室受理情况和BTRC无线模块义务。
gap.zht: 電網電壓和頻率完全相容——標準中國220 V / 50 Hz熱泵產品無需硬體改造。主要安全差距在於認證：基於GB 4706.32（與IEC 60335-2-40高度一致）的CCC檢測報告可縮減重複測試範圍，但不能替代BDS/IEC 60335-2-40的BSTI強制認證。配備Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他無線模組的產品須在孟加拉國另行取得BTRC型式認可，中國SRRC認可不予替代。出口商在出貨前應確認當前BDS標準版本、BSTI檢測實驗室受理情況和BTRC無線模組義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 compliance required under BSTI certification; BTRC type-approval mandatory for wireless-enabled units; grid compatibility excellent (220 V / 50 Hz)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under CCC (GB 4706.32 / GB 4706.1); SRRC for wireless; not equivalent to Bangladesh BSTI or BTRC approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Partial gap — grid voltage and frequency are fully compatible (220 V / 50 Hz); however, BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 compliance under BSTI mandatory certification must be separately obtained; BTRC type-approval is additionally required for wireless-enabled units; CCC and SRRC approvals are not accepted as Bangladesh equivalents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 部分差距——电网电压和频率完全兼容（220 V / 50 Hz）；但须另行取得BDS/IEC 60335-2-40的BSTI强制认证；无线功能机型还须额外取得BTRC型式认可；CCC和SRRC认可不被接受为孟加拉国等效证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 部分差距——電網電壓和頻率完全相容（220 V / 50 Hz）；但須另行取得BDS/IEC 60335-2-40的BSTI強制認證；無線功能機型還須額外取得BTRC型式認可；CCC和SRRC認可不被接受為孟加拉國等效證明。
